  method={"post"}
  path={"/rest/financing/v1/precheck"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Requires <b>applications.precheck</b> authority for authenticated user

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>

  body={{"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"agreementPersonalDataProcessing":{"type":"boolean","description":"flag indicating already approved personal data processing"},"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"additionalData":{"type":"object","properties":{"idCard":{"type":"string","description":"ID card number"},"idCardExpiryDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"ID card expiration date"},"idCardScan":{"type":"object","properties":{"back":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"front":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"}},"title":"FinancingV1IdCardScan"},"personalId":{"type":"string","description":"Personal identification number (format XXXXXXYYYY or XXXXXX/[Y]YYY)"}},"title":"FinancingV1AdditionalDataRequest"},"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"addresses. Only `PERMANENT` and `CONTACT` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"cartItemsRemoved":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total count of removed items form shopping basket during current shopping"},"cashlessTransactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cashless transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"cashlessTransactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"earliestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"oldest transaction date on partner e-shop"},"itemsViewed":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Number of viewed pages with products"},"latestTransactionDate":{"type":"string","format":"date","description":"newest transaction date on partner e-shop."},"pageReviewsTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website in review and comments sections (in seconds)"},"pageTotalTime":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Total time spent on partners website (in seconds)"},"transactionsNumber":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Historical count of customer's cash transactions made in partner's e-shop"},"transactionsSum":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1CustomerExtraData"},"fingerprintComponents":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["key","value"],"properties":{"key":{"type":"string"},"value":{"type":"object"}},"title":"KeyValue"}},"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name"},"fullName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer full name, including academical degrees and salutation."},"ipAddress":{"type":"string","description":"IPv4 or IPv6 address of a customer"},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name"},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Phone number with country code (including leading `+`)"},"tin":{"type":"string","description":"tax identification number (ICO)"}},"title":"FinancingV1PrecheckRequestCustomer"},"order":{"type":"object","properties":{"addresses":{"type":"array","description":"addresses. Only `BILLING` and `DELIVERY` types are allowed.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"addressType":{"type":"string","description":"type of the address. Only some of the types are allowed in each context.","enum":["PERMANENT","CONTACT","DELIVERY","BILLING"]},"city":{"type":"string","description":"city"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"name on address"},"streetAddress":{"type":"string","description":"street/city part"},"streetNumber":{"type":"string","description":"street number"},"zip":{"type":"string","description":"postal code"}},"title":"FinancingV1Address"}},"deliveryCarrier":{"type":"object","properties":{"carrierCustom":{"type":"string","description":"for carriers not found in enumeration of customer ID, specify value as text"},"carrierId":{"type":"string","enum":["CZ_POST_HAND","CZ_POST_OFFICE","CZ_POST_OTHER","PPL","DPD","GEIS","IN_TIME","TOP_TRANS","GEBRUDER_WEISS","LOCAL_COURIER","TNT","GLS","HDS_COMFORT","HDS_STANDARD"]}},"title":"FinancingV1DeliveryCarrier"},"deliveryType":{"type":"string","description":"delivery type, for `DELIVERY_CARRIER` type can be further specified by DeliveryCarrier attribute.Typ doruceni. Dopravcem, osobni prevzeti, online doruceni atd.","enum":["DELIVERY_CARRIER","ONLINE","PERSONAL_BRANCH","PERSONAL_BRANCH_WITH_ASSISTANCE","PERSONAL_PARTNER"]},"documents":{"type":"array","description":"attached documents (invoices etc.)","items":{"type":"object","required":["file","type"],"properties":{"description":{"type":"string","description":"File description"},"extraData":{"type":"object","properties":{"variableSymbol":{"type":"string","description":"variable symbol (internal for e-shop)"}},"title":"FinancingV1DocumentExtraData"},"file":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Type of the document","enum":["INVOICE","PROFORMA_INVOICE","CREDIT_NOTE","OTHER"]}},"title":"FinancingV1Document"}},"items":{"type":"array","description":"order items","items":{"type":"object","required":["name","totalPrice"],"properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"internal code for item (internal to e-shop). Used to better identify the item for future changes","minLength":0,"maxLength":100},"ean":{"type":"string","description":"EAN code","minLength":0,"maxLength":32},"image":{"type":"object","properties":{"content":{"type":"string","description":"File content (Base64 encoded, maximum size of encoded string is 500kB)"},"filename":{"type":"string","description":"file name"},"url":{"type":"string","description":"File URL"}},"title":"FinancingFile"},"name":{"type":"string","description":"item name"},"producer":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Item quantity"},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"item type","enum":["DIGITAL","DISCOUNT","FEE","GIFT_CARD","INSURANCE","PHYSICAL","SALES_TAX","SHIPPING_FEE","STORE_CREDIT"]},"unitPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"}},"title":"FinancingV1ApplicationRequestOrderItem"}},"number":{"type":"string","description":"order number (internal for e-shop)"},"reservationDate":{"type":"string","format":"date-time","description":"Date and time until order is reserved. After this date, e-shop does not guarantee items availability (if application processing is longer, it may endanger order fullfillment)."},"totalPrice":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"variableSymbols":{"type":"array","description":"variable symbols (internal for e-shop)","items":{"type":"string"}}},"title":"FinancingV1PrecheckRequestOrder"},"settingsInstallment":{"type":"object","properties":{"preferredDownPayment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredInstallment":{"type":"object","required":["amount","currency"],"properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in decimal format"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency. ISO 4217"}},"title":"FinancingV1Amount"},"preferredMonths":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"Preferred number of installments (in months)"},"productCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product code, this indicates previous calculation result"},"productSetCode":{"type":"string","description":"Product set code, this will limit further calculations"}},"title":"FinancingV1FinancingSettings"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"Financing type","enum":["CONSUMER_LOAN","GOODS_FINANCING","INSTALLMENT","OPERATING_LEASE"]}},"title":"FinancingV1PrecheckRequest"}}},"description":"request","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

Not set if there is no limit."},"customerOrdersCountRemaining":{"type":"integer","format":"int64","description":"The remaining orders count that the customer can make. Not set if there is no limit."},"customerType":{"type":"string","enum":["UNKNOWN","FIRST_ORDER","FULL","BLOCKED"]},"message":{"type":"string"},"probabilityOfApproval":{"type":"number","format":"float"},"recommendation":{"type":"boolean"},"revolvingCode":{"type":"string","enum":["OK","ADDITIONAL_DATA_SECURITY","ADDITIONAL_ACTION","NEW_REVOLVING","NOT_AVAILABLE"]},"revolvingUsability":{"type":"boolean"},"type":{"type":"string","enum":["DEFERRED_PAYMENT","INSTALLMENT","SUBSCRIPTION","TRY_AND_PAY"]}},"title":"FinancingV1PrecheckResult"}}},"title":"FinancingV1PrecheckResponse"}}}},"201":{"description":"Created"},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized"},"403":{"description":"Forbidden"},"404":{"description":"Not Found"}}}
>
